info.title: benchy
info.description: Benchmark Comparison Tool for comparing performance between commits

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: The directory to output benchmark results

options.name: --output-style
options.description: Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode

options.name: --benchmark
options.description: The benchmark project(s) to run

options.name: --significance-threshold
options.description: Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)

options.name: --decoration
options.description: Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: compare
commands.description: Compare benchmarks between two commits in a repository

options.name: --repository-path
options.description: The path to the local Git repository (auto-detected from current directory if not specified)

options.name: --no-delete
options.description: Do not delete the temporary directories after running the benchmarks

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: The directory to output benchmark results

options.name: --output-style
options.description: Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode

options.name: --benchmark
options.description: The benchmark project(s) to run

options.name: --significance-threshold
options.description: Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)

options.name: --decoration
options.description: Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: BASELINE
arguments.description: The commit reference (hash, branch, or tag) to the baseline version

arguments.name: TARGET
arguments.description: The commit reference (hash, branch, or tag) to the target version (defaults to currently checked out version)

commands.name: ci
commands.description: Compare benchmarks between pre-checked-out directories in a CI environment

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --output-directory
options.description: The directory to output benchmark results

options.name: --output-style
options.description: Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode

options.name: --benchmark
options.description: The benchmark project(s) to run

options.name: --significance-threshold
options.description: Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)

options.name: --decoration
options.description: Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: BASELINE
arguments.description: The directory containing the baseline version to compare

arguments.name: TARGET
arguments.description: The directory containing the target version to compare
